     the Fermi energy is    -0.4775 ev

!    total energy              =   -7324.02061092 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.5E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18397828 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.83663264 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -150406.92455048 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75906.10506565 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.74145110 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   69992.19759890 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.47329561 Ry
